text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 20. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
